name: Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc.
summary: Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. (PINE) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that acquires and manages commercial real estate properties. The company focuses on net lease properties and also invests in commercial loans and investments. PINE operates through consolidated subsidiaries and is subject to risks related to tenant concentration, macroeconomic conditions, interest rates, and real estate market dynamics.
